name: Stefan-Boltzmann Law Calculator
seo_description: Use our free stefan-boltzmann law calculator to quickly estimate power based on t, area, emissivity. No registration needed.
example_label: Calculate power radiated by 300K blackbody of 1m2.
result_context: The radiated power {power} W is emitted according to the Stefan-Boltzmann law.
formula_display: P = Пѓ Г— Оµ Г— A Г— TГўВЃВґ where Пѓ = 5.670374Г—10ГўВЃВ»ГўВЃВё W/(mВІГўГўв‚¬В№вЂ¦KГўВЃВґ)
steps: Temperature T = 500 K, area A = 2.5 mВІ, emissivity Оµ = 0.85
Multiply: Пѓ Г— Оµ Г— A Г— TГўВЃВґ
P = 5.670374Г—10ГўВЃВ»ГўВЃВё Г— 0.85 Г— 2.5 Г— 6.25Г—10В№ГўВЃВ° ГўГўв‚¬В°Л† 7533.16 W
mistakes: Using Celsius instead of Kelvin (must be absolute temperature)

desc: Free online stefan-boltzmann law calculator. Enter temperature and area to get instant results.
